page: Microsoft Azure E64s_v4 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the ESv4 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 32 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8370C processor operating at 2.8 GHz. The x86_64 architecture includes a 48 MB L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512, cryptography extensions (AES, VAES, SHA_NI), and virtualization.

This server is configured with 504.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 7.88 GB per vCPU. It does not include local storage, but it is Premium Storage capable, allowing high-performance remote disk attachments. There are no onboard GPUs.

Benchmark results show strong performance in memory bandwidth, with large-block uncached reads reaching 300.14 GB/sec and writes at 134.52 GB/sec. Multi-threaded operations are highly efficient, as demonstrated by strong results in bzip3 multi-threaded decompression and Passmark extended instructions. Static web serving throughput is also strong at 48.4 GB/sec. However, single-threaded decompression and LLM text generation tasks show weaker relative performance.

The E64s_v4 offers a qualitative balance of high memory density and dedicated compute resources, making it cost-efficient for enterprise workloads that do not require local SSDs or GPUs. It is well-suited for large-scale databases, memory-intensive enterprise applications, multi-threaded data processing, and high-throughput static web serving.
description: The Microsoft Azure E64s_v4 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the ESv4 family, powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8370C processor. It features 64 vCPUs (32 physical cores) running at 2.8 GHz, paired with 504.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 7.88 GB. Running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this x86_64 instance lacks local storage and GPUs but supports Premium Storage for remote disks. Benchmarks indicate strong performance in large-block memory bandwidth, multi-threaded decompression, and static web serving throughput, though single-threaded text generation and LLM inference tasks are weaker. This profile makes the E64s_v4 highly suitable for memory-intensive enterprise applications, large databases, and multi-threaded data processing pipelines.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E64s_v4 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 64 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 504 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability, delivering strong memory bandwidth for enterprise databases.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E64s_v4 is a memory-optimized instance with 64 Intel Xeon vCPUs and 504 GB RAM, designed for database and enterprise workloads.
tagline: A high-density memory-optimized instance featuring sixty-four dedicated cores and premium remote storage support for demanding enterprise database workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and 504.0 GB of RAM
Premium Storage capable with no local disk storage
Strong large-block memory bandwidth and multi-threaded decompression
Optimized for large-scale databases and memory-intensive enterprise applications
Built on Microsoft Hyper-V virtualization with x86_64 architecture
